nasb.text: Next to him Ezer the son of Jeshua, the official of Mizpah, repaired another section in front of the ascent of the armory at the Angle.

esv.text: Next to him Ezer the son of Jeshua, ruler of Mizpah, repaired another section opposite the ascent to the armory at the buttress.

cnv.text: 管理米斯巴的區長耶書亞的兒子以謝修築接著的一段，對著軍械庫的斜坡、城牆轉角的地方。

ccb.text: 再下一段由耶书亚的儿子、管理米斯巴的以谢修筑，他从斜坡对面修到城墙转角的兵器库。
